languages.text: Кран хорошо смазан — похоже, местные техножрецы следят за ним с большим вниманием.
The crane is well oiled — it seems the local Tech-Priests tend to it closely.
languages.original_text: Кран хорошо смазан — похоже, местные техножрецы следят за ним с большим вниманием.

traits.locale_text: The crane is well oiled — it seems the local Tech-Priests tend to it closely.
The crane is well oiled — it seems the local Tech-Priests tend to it closely.
The crane is well oiled — it seems the local Tech-Priests tend to it closely.

languages.text: 起重机保养得很到位，显然这里的技术神甫一直在精心维护它。
languages.original_text: The crane is well oiled — it seems the local Tech-Priests tend to it closely.

traits.locale_text: 起重机保养得很到位，显然这里的技术神甫一直在精心维护它。

languages.text: La grúa está bien engrasada. Parece que los tecnosacerdotes la cuidan con esmero.
languages.original_text: The crane is well oiled — it seems the local Tech-Priests tend to it closely.

traits.locale_text: La grúa está bien engrasada. Parece que los tecnosacerdotes la cuidan con esmero.

languages.text: La grue est bien huilée. Les technoprêtres locaux semblent l'entretenir avec soin.
languages.original_text: The crane is well oiled — it seems the local Tech-Priests tend to it closely.

traits.locale_text: La grue est bien huilée. Les technoprêtres locaux semblent l'entretenir avec soin.

languages.text: Vinç iyi yağlanmış. Görünüşe göre buranın Tekno Rahipleri onunla iyi ilgilenmiş.
languages.original_text: The crane is well oiled — it seems the local Tech-Priests tend to it closely.

traits.locale_text: Vinç iyi yağlanmış. Görünüşe göre buranın Tekno Rahipleri onunla iyi ilgilenmiş.

languages.text: Der Kran ist gut geölt ... die örtlichen Techpriester scheinen ihn regelmäßig zu warten.
languages.original_text: The crane is well oiled — it seems the local Tech-Priests tend to it closely.

traits.locale_text: Der Kran ist gut geölt ... die örtlichen Techpriester scheinen ihn regelmäßig zu warten.

languages.text: クレーンはよく油が塗られている。地元のテクプリストがそれをよく世話しているようだ。
languages.original_text: The crane is well oiled — it seems the local Tech-Priests tend to it closely.

traits.locale_text: クレーンはよく油が塗られている。地元のテクプリストがそれをよく世話しているようだ。
